name: Segment
description: Segment is a customer data platform (CDP) that collects, cleans, and routes user event data to analytics and marketing tools. Track events, identify users, manage sources, destinations, and tracking plans through the API.

capabilities.name: events_track
capabilities.description: Record a user action or event with properties, sending it to all connected destinations.

capabilities.name: users_identify
capabilities.description: Associate a user with traits like email, name, and custom attributes.

capabilities.name: users_group
capabilities.description: Associate a user with a group such as a company or organization.

capabilities.name: page_track
capabilities.description: Record a page view with name, category, and properties.

capabilities.name: screen_track
capabilities.description: Record a mobile screen view with name and properties.

capabilities.name: alias_create
capabilities.description: Merge two user identities together.

capabilities.name: batch_send
capabilities.description: Send multiple tracking calls in a single batch request.

capabilities.name: sources_list
capabilities.description: List all configured data sources in the workspace.

capabilities.name: sources_get
capabilities.description: Get details about a specific source.

capabilities.name: sources_create
capabilities.description: Create a new data source.

capabilities.name: sources_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing source.

capabilities.name: sources_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a data source.

capabilities.name: destinations_list
capabilities.description: List all configured destinations with their enabled status.

capabilities.name: destinations_get
capabilities.description: Get details about a specific destination.

capabilities.name: destinations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new destination connection.

capabilities.name: destinations_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing destination.

capabilities.name: destinations_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a destination connection.

capabilities.name: tracking_plans_list
capabilities.description: List all tracking plans in the workspace.

capabilities.name: tracking_plans_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific tracking plan by ID.

capabilities.name: tracking_plans_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tracking plan.

capabilities.name: workspace_get
capabilities.description: Get information about the current workspace.

capabilities.name: catalog_destinations_list
capabilities.description: Browse the destinations catalog.

capabilities.name: catalog_sources_list
capabilities.description: Browse the sources catalog.
